result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that empathy and understanding flow effortlessly between all people. When individuals and societies truly grasp each other's perspectives—across cultures, beliefs, and experiences—conflict lessens, cooperation thrives, and solutions to shared problems become not just possible, but inevitable.
